plan_desc: All core features are currently free. We're building Pro with more tracking, advanced stats, and more.
plan_coming_soon_desc: We're building more product tracking, unlimited history, advanced stats, and more. We'll let you know when it's ready.
plan_data_policy_desc: Prices are collected once daily. Optimized for long-term price analysis, not real-time alerts.
plan_faq_1_a: Price Eye collects prices once daily. Our goal is accurate long-term history, not instant alerts.
plan_faq_2_a: We never delete your data. All collected price history is stored securely.

landing_feat_subheading: Stop comparing prices manually. Let Price Eye do it for you.
landing_feat_track_desc: Prices are collected automatically every day. See trends at a glance.
landing_feat_alert_desc: Get notified by email the moment a price drops. Never miss a deal.
landing_feat_analysis_desc: Low, high, and average prices help you decide if now is the right time to buy.
landing_how_subheading: No complex setup required. Start tracking right away.

landing_step2_desc: Prices are checked daily and all changes are recorded.

landing_cta_note: Ready to use after signup · No credit card required
landing_seo_title: Price Eye - Online Price Tracker & Drop Alerts
landing_seo_desc: Paste a product link and we'll track prices daily, alerting you to the best time to buy. Start free.
terms_seo_desc: Price Eye Terms of Service. Review the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between users and the operator.
terms_subtitle: These Terms of Service govern the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between users and the operator of Price Eye (the "Service"). By using the Service, you agree to these terms.
privacy_seo_desc: Price Eye Privacy Policy. Learn about the information we collect, how we use it, and our protection measures.
privacy_subtitle: Price Eye (the "Service") complies with the Personal Information Protection Act and related laws, and carefully protects users' personal information. This policy explains the information collected by the Service and how it is used.
privacy_summary_collect_desc: We only collect the minimum information necessary to operate the service.
privacy_summary_nosell_desc: We never sell or provide personal information to third parties without consent.
privacy_summary_delete_desc: Upon request, all personal information is deleted within 30 days.
plan_seo_desc: Price Eye plans. Track prices, get target price alerts, and shop smarter.
plan_jsonld_desc: Track the lowest prices online and get target price alerts to buy at the best time.
